description_long: This object consists of two large rectangular planter boxes, each filled with dense green foliage, connected by a central metal mesh panel. The planters are elevated on sturdy legs, giving the structure a raised appearance suitable for urban environments. The foliage appears lush and well-maintained, suggesting ornamental or low-maintenance plants. The connecting mesh panel may serve as a subtle barrier or decorative element, adding a modern touch to the design. The exterior of the planters is plain and dark, likely made of metal or powder-coated steel, with no visible decorative patterns. This configuration is ideal for use as a divider or barrier in public spaces such as sidewalks, plazas, or park entrances.
description: A pair of large, dark rectangular planter boxes filled with green foliage, connected by a central metal mesh panel and elevated on legs. The design is modern and functional, suitable for urban outdoor placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing both planter boxes, the connecting mesh panel, and the lush green foliage.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile of the planters and the depth of the foliage.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the planters, mesh panel, and greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and plant coverage.
